function.name: get_disk_usage
function.description: Used to calculate the total, used and free space of the disk

type.description: The specific Storage type to retreive

function.name: get_time
function.description: Used to get the current time, date, timezone and combined date and time

type.description: The specific time or date or timezone or combined data to retreive

time_zone.description: This is for updating the timezone data like Asia/Kolkata, America/New_York or Europe/London

function.name: fetch_web_content
function.description: Used to access the Internet and get raw text details from a webpage.

url.description: The absolute HTTP or HTTPS URL of the webpage to fetch (e.g., https://en.wikipedia.org)

function.name: search_local_files
function.description: Used to access the local file system of the device and move through locations

directory.description: The absolute directory path which contains files or there could be directories as well, which can further be storing files

keyword.description: This is the keyword we are searching for and have to find the match

function.name: list_directory_contents
function.description: Used to get the files and directories inside a directory

directory.description: The absolute directory path which contains files and directories as well, which can further be storing files
